text: Code reviews are an essential practice in software development. When developers review each other's code, they can catch bugs early in the process, saving time and effort later. This step helps improve the overall quality of the software. Additionally, code reviews encourage knowledge sharing within the team. Developers learn new techniques, understand different parts of the codebase, and discuss better solutions. By working together in this way, the whole team improves its skills and produces more reliable code. Ultimately, regular code reviews lead to higher team quality and stronger collaboration.
